title: Ava API Gateway Helm Chart Values
description: Configuration values for the avapigw Helm chart

replicaCount.description: Number of replicas for the deployment

tag.description: Overrides the image tag whose default is the chart appVersion

imagePullSecrets.description: Image pull secrets for private registries

nameOverride.description: Override the name of the chart

fullnameOverride.description: Override the full name of the chart

create.description: Specifies whether a service account should be created

automount.description: Automatically mount a ServiceAccount's API credentials

annotations.description: Annotations to add to the service account

name.description: The name of the service account to use

podAnnotations.description: Annotations to add to the pod

podLabels.description: Labels to add to the pod

httpPort.description: HTTP port for REST API traffic

httpsPort.description: HTTPS port for TLS-encrypted REST API traffic

grpcTlsPort.description: gRPC TLS port for TLS-encrypted gRPC traffic

annotations.description: Annotations to add to the service

metricsNodePort.description: Fixed NodePort for the metrics endpoint (NodePort service type)

annotations.description: Annotations to add to the ingress

plainAlongsideTls.description: Render an additional plain HTTP listener (http-plain) on the HTTP port alongside the TLS HTTP listener when TLS is active

maxSessions.description: Global max sessions configuration for concurrent connection limiting

queueSize.description: Queue size for pending requests when max is reached

maxBodySize.description: Maximum allowed GraphQL request body size in bytes (default: 10MB)

aggregate.description: Aggregate (fan-out) mirroring configuration for the route

enabled.description: Enable aggregate fan-out for this route

quorumCount.description: Explicit success threshold when failMode is quorum

perMessageMerge.description: Enable per-message JSON merge for streaming traffic

targets.description: Backends to fan out to (at least one)

strategy.description: Merge strategy. 'ndjson' merges newline-delimited JSON record streams (with optional sort/de-dupe/limit) instead of merging JSON documents

timeField.description: NDJSON sort key (ndjson strategy only). Records are stably sorted by this field. Default: '_time'

keyField.description: NDJSON de-duplication key (ndjson strategy only). Duplicate records are removed first-wins after sorting

limit.description: Caps the number of emitted NDJSON records (ndjson strategy only). 0 means unlimited

spool.description: Optional off-heap spooling of partial responses

output.description: Audit output destination (stdout, stderr, or file path)

redactFields.description: Fields to redact from audit logs

enabled.description: Enable rate limiting for this backend

specFile.description: Path to the OpenAPI specification file

specURL.description: URL to fetch the OpenAPI specification from

validateRequestParams.description: Enable request parameter validation (path, query, header)

vault.description: Gateway-wide Vault client connection rendered verbatim as spec.vault in the generated gateway config. Deployment-injected VAULT_* environment variables override these fields per-field (ENV > config file > defaults). When set, replaces the legacy spec.vault block derived from the top-level vault.* values.

address.description: Vault server address (e.g. https://vault:8200); required when enabled unless VAULT_ADDR is set

token.description: Inline Vault token (discouraged; prefer tokenFile or the VAULT_TOKEN environment variable)

tokenFile.description: Path to a file containing the Vault token (mutually exclusive with token)

mountPath.description: Mount path of the Kubernetes auth method (default kubernetes)

tokenPath.description: Path to the ServiceAccount token file

secretId.description: Inline AppRole secret ID (discouraged; prefer secretIdFile or the VAULT_APPROLE_SECRET_ID environment variable)

secretIdFile.description: Path to a file containing the AppRole secret ID (mutually exclusive with secretId)

mountPath.description: Mount path of the AppRole auth method (default approle)

tls.description: TLS for the connection TO the Vault server (file paths)

caCert.description: Path to a PEM-encoded CA certificate file

caPath.description: Path to a directory of PEM-encoded CA certificate files

clientCert.description: Path to the client certificate for mTLS to Vault

clientKey.description: Path to the client private key for mTLS to Vault

serverName.description: TLS server name (SNI) override for Vault server verification

skipVerify.description: Disable TLS certificate verification (insecure; testing only)

retry.description: Request retry behavior of the Vault client

operatorMode.description: Operator mode: gateway receives configuration from the operator via gRPC

tls.description: Enable TLS for the operator connection

caSecret.description: Secret containing the operator CA certificate (key ca.crt); empty uses <operator-fullname>-grpc-cert

otlpInsecure.description: OTLP exporter transport security (tri-state). Unset/null: TLS material forces TLS, otherwise plaintext only for unset/loopback endpoints and remote endpoints default to TLS with system roots. true forces plaintext, false forces TLS.

otlpTLS.description: TLS material for the OTLP exporter connection (mTLS and/or private CA)

keyFile.description: Client private key path (PEM), requires certFile

caFile.description: CA bundle path (PEM); empty uses system trust store

maxBodySize.description: Maximum request body size in bytes

customConfig.description: Custom gateway configuration merged into the generated config (free-form; do not put a 'vault' key here - use gateway.vault)

cache.description: DEPRECATED/unused by templates: global cache block is not rendered into the gateway config; configure caching per-route (CRDs or route config) or via customConfig

grpcRoutes.description: gRPC routes configuration (rendered verbatim as spec.grpcRoutes)

grpcBackends.description: gRPC backends configuration (rendered verbatim as spec.grpcBackends)

graphqlRoutes.description: GraphQL routes configuration (rendered verbatim as spec.graphqlRoutes)

graphqlBackends.description: GraphQL backends configuration (rendered verbatim as spec.graphqlBackends)

injectEnv.description: Inject VAULT_* environment variables into the gateway deployment. Set false to source the Vault client connection solely from the spec.vault section rendered via gateway.vault (ENV > file > default per-field); PKI issuance (vault.pki) is unaffected.

skipVerify.description: Skip TLS verification (not recommended for production)

pki.description: Vault PKI configuration for listener TLS certificates

enabled.description: Enable Vault PKI for listener TLS

pkiMount.description: Vault PKI secrets engine mount path

grpc.description: gRPC listener PKI overrides. Falls back to main vault.pki settings when not set.

enabled.description: Enable Vault PKI for gRPC listener TLS (defaults to vault.pki.enabled)

pkiMount.description: Vault PKI secrets engine mount path for gRPC (defaults to vault.pki.pkiMount)

role.description: Vault PKI role name for gRPC (defaults to vault.pki.role)

commonName.description: Common name for gRPC certificate requests (defaults to vault.pki.commonName)

altNames.description: Subject alternative names for gRPC (defaults to vault.pki.altNames)

ttl.description: Certificate TTL for gRPC (defaults to vault.pki.ttl)

operator.description: Operator configuration for CRD-based gateway management

replicaCount.description: Number of replicas for the operator deployment

tag.description: Operator image tag (defaults to chart appVersion)

enabled.description: Enable leader election for controller manager

resourceName.description: Resource name for leader election lease

port.description: gRPC server port for gateway communication

caBundle.description: PEM CA bundle that verifies the operator's gRPC serving certificate; stored as ca.crt in the <operator-fullname>-grpc-cert Secret mounted by the gateway. Required for a verified chain with mode=vault (set to the Vault PKI CA).

requireClientCert.description: Require client certificates for gRPC connections (mTLS)

caBundle.description: Base64-encoded CA bundle for webhook validation

annotations.description: Annotations to add to the service

resources.description: Resource limits and requests for operator

create.description: Specifies whether a service account should be created

automount.description: Automatically mount a ServiceAccount's API credentials

annotations.description: Annotations to add to the service account

name.description: The name of the service account to use

imagePullSecrets.description: Image pull secrets for private registries (operator-specific; merged with global)

podAnnotations.description: Annotations to add to the operator pod

podLabels.description: Labels to add to the operator pod

extraEnv.description: Extra environment variables for the operator

extraEnvFrom.description: Extra env from secrets/configmaps for the operator

livenessProbe.description: Operator liveness probe (kubernetes probe spec: httpGet/exec/tcpSocket, delays, thresholds)

readinessProbe.description: Operator readiness probe (kubernetes probe spec: httpGet/exec/tcpSocket, delays, thresholds)

volumes.description: Additional volumes for the operator pod

volumeMounts.description: Additional volume mounts for the operator container

nodeSelector.description: Node selector for operator pod scheduling

affinity.description: Affinity rules for operator pod scheduling

topologySpreadConstraints.description: Topology spread constraints for operator pod scheduling

namespace.description: Informational namespace hint used by local test values/scripts (not applied by templates)

topologySpreadConstraints.description: Topology spread constraints for pod scheduling

extraEnvFrom.description: Extra environment variables from secrets or configmaps

livenessProbe.description: Gateway liveness probe (kubernetes probe spec: httpGet/exec/tcpSocket, delays, thresholds)

readinessProbe.description: Gateway readiness probe (kubernetes probe spec: httpGet/exec/tcpSocket, delays, thresholds)

volumeMounts.description: Additional volume mounts for the container

redisEnv.description: Redis Sentinel environment variables for the gateway (ENV > YAML precedence)

tls.description: TLS configuration for backend mTLS certificate mounting

routeCerts.description: Route-level TLS certificates for SNI-based certificate selection
